name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: A comprehensive capability set providing marketing skills tailored for AI agents like Claude Code, including Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to enhance digital marketing strategies.

inputs.name: marketing_goals
inputs.description: The specific marketing objectives or targets the user wants to achieve.

inputs.name: content_data
inputs.description: Text or raw copy for analysis, enhancement, or generation.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website or landing page for SEO and analytics evaluation.

inputs.name: performance_metrics
inputs.description: Collected analytics data used to assess CRO and growth opportunities.

inputs.name: keywords_list
inputs.description: List of keywords or search terms used in SEO planning and optimization.

outputs.name: optimized_copy
outputs.description: Copywriting output optimized for conversion and SEO.

outputs.name: seo_strategy
outputs.description: Recommendations and action plan for improving SEO performance.

outputs.name: growth_plan
outputs.description: Strategic guidance for growth engineering based on analytics and CRO.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Insightful analytics summarized for marketing decision-making.

patterns: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) funnel analysis and improvement
SEO keyword research and content optimization
Copywriting enhancement for high engagement and conversion
Iterative testing and refinement of marketing strategies
steps: Input marketing goals and data including content, website URL, and performance metrics.
Perform SEO analysis to identify relevant keywords and optimization opportunities.
Generate or enhance copywriting content tailored to target audience and conversion goals.
Analyze analytics data to assess current performance and identify growth opportunities.
Formulate and deliver a comprehensive marketing strategy combining CRO, SEO, copywriting, and growth tactics.
Iterate with user feedback and continue optimizing for measurable improvements.
use_cases: Improving website conversion rates through targeted copy and layout adjustments.
Creating SEO-optimized marketing content to increase organic traffic.
Generating data-driven growth strategies for digital marketing campaigns.
Enhancing AI agent marketing capabilities with advanced marketing skillsets.
Automating marketing tasks like keyword research and copywriting for scalability.

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the website at {website_url} and provide an SEO strategy focused on these keywords: {keywords_list}.

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_enhancement_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Improve the following marketing copy for higher conversions and engagement: {content_data}.

prompt_templates.name: conversion_rate_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Given these performance metrics: {performance_metrics}, suggest CRO improvements to meet these marketing goals: {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create a growth engineering plan based on this analytics report: {analytics_report} and the target goals: {marketing_goals}.
